# Neo Website Home Section

Related to the Hacktoberfest Welcome ticket: https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/5963 (Please read this ticket first)

Another shout-out to all designers who would like to participate in the hacktoberfest event.

![Screenshot 2024-10-02 at 15 58 12](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/bc3fb956-b71f-46bf-83ea-fee09996fe42)

The very first page when opening the Neo.mjs website still looks odd.

@mxmrtns had the idea to make the tag-line the biggest element, the logo smaller on top and the content text centered.
Rationale: Neo.mjs is not yet a known brand, so the tag-line provides the most value.

Maybe it could go a bit into this direction: https://nuxt.com/

Looking forward to your ideas!

Thanks in advance,
Tobi
